mapper.sql: id, motherboard_user_id, credential_resource_id, name, provider, access_key_id, access_key_secret, bill_owner_id, enabled, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM cloud_account WHERE id = #{id} AND motherboard_user_id = #{motherboardUserId}
SELECT FROM cloud_account WHERE motherboard_user_id = #{motherboardUserId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cloud_account (motherboard_user_id, credential_resource_id, name, provider, access_key_id, access_key_secret, bill_owner_id, enabled) VALUES (#{motherboardUserId}, #{credentialResourceId}, #{name}, #{provider}, #{accessKeyId}, #{accessKeySecret}, #{billOwnerId}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE cloud_account SET name = #{name}, provider = #{provider}, access_key_id = #{accessKeyId}, access_key_secret = #{accessKeySecret}, bill_owner_id = #{billOwnerId}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id} AND motherboard_user_id = #{motherboardUserId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cloud_account WHERE id = #{id} AND motherboard_user_id = #{motherboardUserId}
